name: Johari Table Lamp - 20.25 Inch Height - TBL4512 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Johari table lamp, a perfect blend of art and functionality. Standing at 20.25 inches, this black resin lamp adds a touch of elegance to any room. Crafted from polyresin, its sleek and modern design makes it an ideal centerpiece for your living area or workspace. 

The robust build of the lamp complements its understated style, making it suitable for various decor themes. Whether you're looking to enhance your reading nook or add ambience to your living room, the Johari lamp delivers the right amount of sophistication and charm. 

Its compact size and versatile color ensure seamless integration into your existing setup, while its contemporary appeal offers a refreshing update to your decor. Elevate your interior aesthetics with this stylish table lamp, designed to bring a cozy and inviting atmosphere to your home.
